items.question: I HAVE PLACED AN ORDER, BUT HAVEN'T RECEIVED AN ORDER CONFIRMATION
items.answer: PLEASE SECURE THAT YOU HAVE USED THE CORRECT EMAIL ADDRESS. CHECK YOUR SPAM FOLDER TO SEE IF THE ORDER CONFIRMATION CAN BE FOUND THERE. IF YOU HAVE NO SUCCESS WITH THE FOLLOWING, PLEASE CONTACT US AT 9T7RUNNING@GMAIL.COM. RESPOND TIME 1-2 BUSINESS DAYS.

items.question: I HAVEN'T RECEIVED ANY SHIPPING INFORMATION ON MY ORDER
items.answer: OUR SHIPPING AGENT WILL AUTOMATICALLY NOTIFY YOU WITH YOUR TRACKING CODE AND UPDATED SHIPPING INFORMATION. PLEASE CHECK YOUR SPAM FOLDER TO SEE IF THE ORDER CONFIRMATION CAN BE FOUND THERE. IF YOU HAVEN'T RECEIVED ANY SHIPPING INFORMATION, PLEASE CONTACT US AT 9T7RUNNING@GMAIL.COM. RESPOND TIME 1-2 BUSINESS DAYS.

items.question: HOW DO I CANCEL MY ORDER?
items.answer: IT IS NOT POSSIBLE TO CANCEL YOUR ORDER YOURSELF. IF YOU WISH TO CANCEL YOUR ORDER, PLEASE CONTACT US AT 9T7RUNNING@GMAIL.COM. IF OUR WAREHOUSE HAS STARTED PROCESSING YOUR ORDER OR IT HAS BEEN SHIPPED BEFORE RECEIVING YOUR CANCEL REQUEST, YOUR ORDER MIGHT GET SHIPPED DESPITE YOUR REQUEST. PLEASE GO TO RETURNS.

items.question: WHEN WILL I BE CHARGED?
items.answer: WE WILL CHARGE YOU WHEN YOUR ORDER IS PACKED AND READY TO BE SHIPPED. THERE CAN BE A DELAY ON THE CHARGES AND YOU MIGHT FIRST SEE THE CHARGE ON YOUR BANK ACCOUNT AFTER A FEW DAYS.

items.question: CAN I PICK UP MY ORDER INSTEAD?
items.answer: UNFORTUNATELY IT ISN'T POSSIBLE TO CHOOSE PICK UP.

items.question: WHICH COUNTRIES DO YOU SHIP TO?
items.answer: WE SHIP TO DENMARK AND SELECTED EUROPEAN COUNTRIES.

items.question: HOW DO I RETURN AN ORDER?
items.answer: PLEASE GO TO RETURN TO LEARN MORE ABOUT RETURNS.

items.question: WHEN WILL I RECEIVE MY ORDER?
items.answer: PLEASE GO TO SHIPPING TO LEARN MORE ABOUT SHIPPING AND DELIVERY.

items.question: DIDN'T FIND THE ANSWER TO YOUR QUESTION?
items.answer: FEEL FREE TO CONTACT US AT 9T7RUNNING@GMAIL.COM. WE'LL ANSWER ANY QUESTION. RESPOND TIME 1-2 BUSINESS DAYS.
